addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, or OBDSTAR X300 DP) to port under driver-side dash below steering column. Select Hyundai > Elantra > IMMO > Key Programming. Enter vehicle PIN if prompted (pre-2006 units may not require PIN). Follow tool-guided procedure to learn new ID46 transponder key. Alternatively, ID46 PCF7936AS chip can be cloned from a working key using an ID46 cloner without OBD access.
allKeysLost: Use OBD programmer for full IMMO learn. For pre-2006 units without PIN requirement: connect programmer and follow guided AKL procedure. For 2006+ units: obtain 6-digit PIN via PIN-by-VIN calculator (DiagCode or CWP-2, covers 2006-2016) then connect programmer, enter PIN, and register new key. Alternatively, clone the chip from EEPROM dump using ICC or Abrites with EEPROM read adapter if OBD path is blocked.
pinSource: PIN by VIN (2006-2010 units) | dealer | null for pre-2006
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 1 hour lockout after 3 wrong PIN attempts (leave ignition on)
specialTool: ID46 cloner (for clone path) | PIN-by-VIN calculator for 2006-2010

addKey: Obtain 6-digit PIN via PIN-by-VIN calculator (DiagCode covers 2006-2016). Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, Smart Pro by Ilco) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Elantra > IMMO (or Smart Key Unit for push-start trims). Enter PIN when prompted. Follow tool-guided procedure to register new transponder or smart key. Horn beeps 0.2s to confirm each key learned.
allKeysLost: Obtain PIN via DiagCode PIN-by-VIN (2006-2016 era). Connect OBD programmer. Select AKL/Reset procedure. Enter PIN. Follow guided procedure to register new key(s). All previously registered keys are erased and must be re-registered in one session. If PIN-by-VIN fails, PIN can be read from a working key via Abrites PROTAG adapter or extracted from EEPROM dump.
pinSource: PIN by VIN (DiagCode/CWP-2, covers 2006-2016)
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 1 hour lockout after 3 wrong PIN attempts; counter only decrements with ignition ON
specialTool: DiagCode or CWP-2 PIN-by-VIN calculator

addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, OBDSTAR X300 DP) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Elantra > IMMO > Smart Key System. Tool reads PIN via OBD (no external PIN calculator needed for this era). Select Add Key. Present new key fob near Start/Stop button when prompted and press it to complete learning. Test all keys.
allKeysLost: Connect OBD programmer. Select Hyundai > Elantra > IMMO > All Keys Lost (or Reset). Tool reads PIN from ECU via OBD. Follow guided procedure to register new key(s). All previously registered keys are erased. If tool fails to read PIN via standard IMMO path, use Diagnostics > Smart Key Unit > Smart Key Code Saving workaround (Autel) or use Xhorse Key Tool Max Pro to read PIN first, then program with primary tool.
pinSource: OBD read (tool reads from ECU directly)
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 1 hour lockout after 3 wrong PIN attempts; 24-hour wait if ECU enters enhanced security mode
specialTool: Autel IM608 or Lonsdor K518 (8A/Texas AES chip support required)

addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, OBDSTAR X300 DP, Xhorse VVDI2) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Elantra > IMMO > Smart Key System. Tool reads PIN via OBD (HITAG-AES 6A era). Select Add Key. Present new key fob near Start/Stop button when prompted and press it to learn. Test all keys. If Autel reports 'smart key condition not met,' switch to Diagnostics > IMMO Keys > Smart Key Unit path.
allKeysLost: Connect capable OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, OBDSTAR X300 DP). Select All Keys Lost / Reset path. Tool reads PIN via OBD or requires online PIN server query (Autel server, 1-4 min with stable internet). Follow guided procedure. All previous keys erased; register new keys in one session. Blade key must be cut by locksmith (KK12 keyway) for emergency access before programming.
pinSource: OBD read (tool reads from ECU) or Autel online server
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 24-hour wait if ECU enters enhanced security lockout mode
specialTool: Autel IM608 or Lonsdor K518 (6A/HITAG-AES chip support required)

addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Xhorse VVDI2) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Sonata > IMMO > Key Programming. Follow tool-guided procedure to register new ID46 transponder. Pre-2006 units typically require no PIN. 2006-2010 units: obtain PIN via DiagCode PIN-by-VIN calculator and enter when prompted. Alternatively, clone ID46 PCF7936AS chip from working key without OBD.
allKeysLost: Obtain PIN via DiagCode for 2006-2010 (if applicable). Connect OBD programmer. Select AKL procedure. Enter PIN. Register new key(s). All previously registered keys erased. For pre-2006 units without PIN requirement, follow guided AKL procedure directly via OBD. ID46 can also be cloned from EEPROM dump.
pinSource: PIN by VIN for 2006-2010 (DiagCode) | null for pre-2006
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 1 hour lockout after 3 wrong PIN attempts
specialTool: ID46 cloner (for clone path) | PIN-by-VIN calculator for 2006-2010

addKey: Obtain 6-digit PIN via DiagCode PIN-by-VIN calculator (covers 2006-2016). Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Sonata > IMMO > Smart Key System. Enter PIN when prompted. Present new key fob near Start/Stop button and press to learn. Horn beeps to confirm. Test all keys.
allKeysLost: Obtain PIN via DiagCode PIN-by-VIN. Connect OBD programmer. Select AKL/Reset path. Enter PIN. Follow guided procedure to register new key(s). All previous keys erased. Must register minimum 1 key; program additional keys in same session. Cut HY22 blade for emergency mechanical entry before programming.
pinSource: PIN by VIN (DiagCode, covers 2006-2016)
obdPort: Under driver-side dash, below steering column, facing down
securityWait: 1 hour lockout after 3 wrong PIN attempts; counter only decrements with ignition ON
specialTool: DiagCode or CWP-2 PIN-by-VIN calculator

addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, OBDSTAR X300 DP) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Sonata > IMMO > Smart Key System. Tool reads PIN via OBD or Autel online server (Texas AES 8A era). Select Add Key. Present key fob near Start/Stop button and press it. Test all keys. Diagnostic path (Diagnostics > IMMO Keys > SMK) may be needed if standard IMMO path fails.
allKeysLost: Connect OBD programmer. Select AKL/Reset path. Tool reads PIN via OBD or queries Autel server (1-4 min). Follow guided procedure to register new key(s). All previous keys erased; register all needed keys in one session. Cut HY22 blade for emergency access first.

addKey: Connect OBD programmer (Autel IM608, Lonsdor K518, OBDSTAR X300 DP, Xhorse VVDI2) to port under driver-side dash. Select Hyundai > Sonata > IMMO > Smart Key System (HITAG3/ID47 era).
